about.name: Ajay S
about.bio: Passionate Full-Stack Developer crafting elegant, high-performance web applications with Python, Flask, and modern frontend technologies. Turning complex problems into simple, beautiful, and intuitive solutions.

projects.name: Task Management App
projects.description: Full-stack task manager with user auth, CRUD operations, and a dynamic dashboard built with Flask & SQLite.

projects.name: Data Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Interactive data visualization dashboard using Pandas, NumPy, and Chart.js for real-time analytical insights.

projects.name: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: Modern e-commerce store with product management, shopping cart, payment integration, and admin panel.

projects.name: Sentiment Analyzer
projects.description: ML-powered sentiment analysis tool that classifies text into positive, negative, or neutral categories.

projects.name: Web Scraping Suite
projects.description: Automated web scraping toolkit with scheduling, data extraction pipelines, and export to CSV/JSON.

projects.name: Real-Time Chat App
projects.description: Real-time messaging application with rooms, typing indicators, and online status using WebSockets.

experience.details: Building custom web solutions for clients worldwide. Specializing in Flask, Python automation, and responsive front-end development.
Worked on full-stack projects, built REST APIs, and collaborated with senior developers to deploy production applications.
Completed an intensive training covering Python core, data structures, algorithms, and web development with Flask and Django.
